title: NHAI Eminent External Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: National Highways Authority of India has released the official Eminent External Professional Notification 2026 at the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the NHAI Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 65 years with qualifications such as Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering, Post Graduate Degree/Diploma in Transport Planning, or Master’s Degree in Economics with relevant experience can apply online up to 29 May 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering, Post Graduate Degree or Post Graduate Diploma in Transport Planning, Master’s Degree in Economics, Minimum 5 years relevant experience
qualification.details: Eminent External Professional (Transport Planner): Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering from a University or Institute; Post Graduate Degree or Post Graduate Diploma in Transport Planning from a University or Institute; Minimum 5 Years of experience in the field of transport planning/ highway planning/ traffic engineering/ mobility planning/ modelling, or experience in assessment of transport project, preferably road projects. Eminent External Professional (Transport Economist): Master’s Degree in Economics from a recognized University or Institute; Minimum 5 Years of experience in economic analysis of financial appraisal of projects, preferably in transport or road sector.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NHAI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHAI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NHAI Eminent External Professional posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the NHAI Eminent External Professional posts is 29th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Eminent External Professional posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Eminent External Professional posts in the National Highways Authority of India (NHAI).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Transport Planner role?
faq.answer: For the Transport Planner role, candidates need a Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering and a Post Graduate Degree or Diploma in Transport Planning, along with 5 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Eminent External Professional posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Eminent External Professional posts is 65 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an application fee for NHAI Eminent External Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for General/OBC categories. It is likely that no fee is required for other categories as well, but it's best to confirm with the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for these NHAI jobs?
faq.answer: The application process for the NHAI Eminent External Professional posts is entirely online. Candidates must apply through the official NHAI website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The Eminent External Professional positions are offered on a contract basis. This means the employment is for a fixed term, not permanent.

faq.question: Q8. What is the minimum experience required for the Transport Economist post?
faq.answer: For the Transport Economist position, candidates must have a minimum of 5 years of experience in economic analysis of financial appraisal of projects, preferably in the transport or road sector.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for NHAI recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of NHAI?
faq.answer: The official website of the National Highways Authority of India (NHAI) is www.nhai.gov.in. You can visit this site for more information and updates.
